prostate_cancer_diagnosis_date: First prostate cancer diagnosis date (OMOP-derived, date shifted)
date_of_birth: Date-shifted DOB reconstructed from OMOP year/month/day
gender: Gender concept name from OMOP vocabulary
race: Race concept name from OMOP vocabulary
ethnicity: Ethnicity concept name from OMOP vocabulary
age_at_diagnosis: Age in years at first prostate cancer diagnosis
is_deceased: Indicates whether the patient has a death date
lab_value_final: Final value used for analysis (converted if possible)
days_relative_to_platinum_chemo_start: Days from platinum chemo start to measurement
days_relative_to_last_followup: Days from last follow-up to measurement
